TEXT.citation: Gravius, Daniël. 1661. Het Heylige Evangelium Matthei en Johannis ofte Hagnau Ka D'llig Matiktik. Ka na sasoulat ti Mattheus, ti Johannes appa. Overgeset inde Formosaansche tale, voor de Inwoonders van Soulang, Mattau, Sinckan, Bacloan, Tavocan en Tevorang. Amsterdam: Michiel Hartogh.

S.FORM: Irou ka ni'td-darum ta teni tou voukyn-da, mabatoung ta makoilalaulau ka ni-mæ-æuugh tyni-æn.
Irou ka ni'td-darum ta teni tou voukyn-da, mabatoung ta makoilalaulau ka ni-mæ-æuugh tyni-æn.
S.TRANSL: Doe hy nu ban den bergh afgeklommen was riji hem bele charen gebolght. _
When he was come down from the mountain, great multitudes followed him.
耶穌下了山，有許多人跟着他。

S.FORM: Ka kytt'ei ta Leproos la ou-tatäum-min, ni-iroua deip tyni-æn, koun, Meirang, dou mamoei-kow, paka-lpough kow paka-kou-ptigh iau-an-da.
Ka kytt'ei ta Leproos la ou-tatäum-min, ni-iroua deip tyni-æn, koun, Meirang, dou mamoei-kow, paka-lpough kow paka-kou-ptigh iau-an-da.
S.TRANSL: Endosiet een mel actsche quam ende aenbadt hem seggende Heere indien ghy wilt ghy kont my repnigen.
And, behold, there came a leper and worshipped him, saying, Lord, if thou wilt, thou canst make me clean.
有一個長大痲瘋的來拜他，說：「主若肯，必能叫我潔淨了。」

S.FORM: Ka dou sikkiskigh ki rima tyn ta ti Jesus, ni-smoukla tyni-æn, koun; Mamoei-koh nda kmoupti-â. Ka ni-paka-soum-mun paka-kouptigh ta 'æ-tatäum-mun tyn.
Ka dou sikkiskigh ki rima tyn ta ti Jesus, ni-smoukla tyni-æn, koun; Mamoei-koh nda kmoupti-â. Ka ni-paka-soum-mun paka-kouptigh ta 'æ-tatäum-mun tyn.
S.TRANSL: Ende Jesus de hanc uyseckende heefc Hem aengeraeckt [leggende Ick wil wort gerepnight . Ende terGont werdt [hy ban]syne melaetshept gereymnight. |
And Jesus put forth his hand, and touched him, saying, I will; be thou clean. And immediately his leprosy was cleansed.
耶穌伸手摸他，說：「我肯，你潔淨了吧！」他的大痲瘋立刻就潔淨了。

S.FORM: Ka ni-koumma ta ti Jesus tyni-æn, kytt'ei, ka assi 'mhou banavana-eih ti mamang-an: Râ ou-qua, pakytt-â ymhou=an ki Dadilo, ka pihgik-â ki pæp-'hæn ka na sikakidi ti Moses, tou pattæi-tounnoun-en ki rÿh nein.

Ka ni-koumma ta ti Jesus tyni-æn, kytt'ei, ka assi 'mhou banavana-eih ti mamang-an: Râ ou-qua, pakytt-â ymhou=an ki Dadilo, ka pihgik-â ki pæp-'hæn ka na sikakidi ti Moses, tou pattæi-tounnoun-en ki rÿh nein.
S.TRANSL: Ende Jesus leyde tot hem Siet dat ghy [dic] memant en seght : maer gaet henen henen toont U leiben den Puester ende offert de gabe die Mosis gheboden heefc hae! tot een getuygriille.
And Jesus saith unto him, See thou tell no man; but go thy way, shew thyself to the priest, and offer the gift that Moses commanded, for a testimony unto them.
耶穌對他說：「你切不可告訴人，只要去把身體給祭司察看，獻上摩西所吩咐的禮物，對眾人作證據。」 （路7‧1－10）

S.FORM: Irou ka ni-fa-rarbo ta ti Jesus tou Kapernaum, ni-iroua tyni-æn ta Mei-sasou ki sat ka'ǣtouh-an [ki voual] tmoumimia tyni-æn,
Irou ka ni-fa-rarbo ta ti Jesus tou Kapernaum, ni-iroua tyni-æn ta Mei-sasou ki sat ka'ǣtouh-an [ki voual] tmoumimia tyni-æn,
S.TRANSL: Alsnn Felus te Caperhaum ingegaen was quam tot hem een Hooftman ober hondert biddende hem
And when Jesus was entered into Capernaum, there came unto him a centurion, beseeching him,
耶穌進了迦百農，有一個百夫長進前來，求他說：

S.FORM: Koun, Meirang, kyh-tallah maliko ta rarau-wei-au ka dimmi-dimmi-en [ki voual,] ka pæi-lou as pæi-alalam.
Koun, Meirang, kyh-tallah maliko ta rarau-wei-au ka dimmi-dimmi-en [ki voual,] ka pæi-lou as pæi-alalam.
S.TRANSL: Ende leggende Heere mijn knecht light te huys gheraeckt ende lijdt twate phnen.
And saying, Lord, my servant lieth at home sick of the palsy, grievously tormented.
「主啊，我的僕人害癱瘓病，躺在家裏，甚是疼苦。」

S.FORM: Ka ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus tyni-æn, Irouah-koh paka-kouridagh tyni-æn.
Ka ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus tyni-æn, Irouah-koh paka-kouridagh tyni-æn.
S.TRANSL: Ende Jesus seyde tot hem Ick sal komen ende em genesen.
And Jesus saith unto him, I will come and heal him.
耶穌說：「我去醫治他。」

S.FORM: Ka dou mattæi-vli ta Mei-sasou ki sat ka'ǣtouh-an [ki voual] ni-k'ma, Assi koh keirang-en ki kidi ka mou-rbo-ah kow ki apang-au, râ pou-dyk-kâ po-sou ki sou ka saasat, anna ta madarikæh-æh ta rarawei-au.

Ka dou mattæi-vli ta Mei-sasou ki sat ka'ǣtouh-an [ki voual] ni-k'ma, Assi koh keirang-en ki kidi ka mou-rbo-ah kow ki apang-au, râ pou-dyk-kâ po-sou ki sou ka saasat, anna ta madarikæh-æh ta rarawei-au.
S.TRANSL: Ei de Hooftman ober | Hondert aritwooordende seyDe Heere ik en ben niet weer Bigh dat gy onde? mijn back foudt in komen mar: spreeckt alleenlick een woort eii mijn knecht sal genesen worden.
The centurion answered and said, Lord, I am not worthy that thou shouldest come under my roof: but speak the word only, and my servant shall be healed.
百夫長回答說：「主啊，你到我舍下，我不敢當；只要你說一句話，我的僕人就必好了。

S.FORM: Ka tau-appa koh ka ni-ahkoun pa-pei-sasou [ki ra rouma] ka fi-darim iau-an ta tama-macyt, ka mattæi-koumma-koh-hia ki sou ti att'an, Ouqua, ka mou-qua: ki pani-appa, Irou-â, ka iroua: ki rarauwei-appa-mau, Mei-ringei-â ki atta, ka mei-ring-ei-râ.

Ka tau-appa koh ka ni-ahkoun pa-pei-sasou [ki ra rouma] ka fi-darim iau-an ta tama-macyt, ka mattæi-koumma-koh-hia ki sou ti att'an, Ouqua, ka mou-qua: ki pani-appa, Irou-â, ka iroua: ki rarauwei-appa-mau, Mei-ringei-â ki atta, ka mei-ring-ei-râ.
S.TRANSL: Want ick ben oock een mensche snder de macht [yan andere, ] hebbende onder mp kiijghs-knechten : ende ick segge tot desen Gaet ende hy gaet : ende tot den anderen Komt ende hy komc: efi tot mijnen dienltknecht Doet dat ende hy doet het.
For I am a man under authority, having soldiers under me: and I say to this man, Go, and he goeth; and to another, Come, and he cometh; and to my servant, Do this, and he doeth it.
因為我在人的權下，也有兵在我以下；對這個說『去！』他就去；對那個說『來！』他就來；對我的僕人說『你做這事！』他就去做。」

S.FORM: Dou millingigh [ki atta] ta ti Jefus, ni-mouh-kiap-da, ka ni-k'ma neini-æn ka mææuugh [tyni-æn,] D'lligh koùn-nau-ka-mou-râ, assi-appa coh maki-valei ki tnamsing-an ka komma hia irang tou Israel.
Dou millingigh [ki atta] ta ti Jefus, ni-mouh-kiap-da, ka ni-k'ma neini-æn ka mææuugh [tyni-æn,] D'lligh koùn-nau-ka-mou-râ, assi-appa coh maki-valei ki tnamsing-an ka komma hia irang tou Israel.
S.TRANSL: Fesns nu [ dir] hoorende heefc hem berwondeyt ende feyde tot de gene die [hem] bolghden Doorars oo segghe ick u Ick en hebbe seifs in Jsrael soo qrooten gheloobe niet gebonden.
When Jesus heard it, he marvelled, and said to them that followed, Verily I say unto you, I have not found so great faith, no, not in Israel.
耶穌聽見就希奇，對跟從的人說：「我實在告訴你們，這麼大的信心，就是在以色列中，我也沒有遇見過。

S.FORM: Kapasousou-en-au-kamourà, ka mabatoung ta irou-ah ka makka-reia ki makka-raour, ka mirong-ah itou-lam ti Abrahaman Ifaäk-an, ti Jakob-an, tou peisasou-an ki tounnoun ki vullu vullum.
Kapasousou-en-au-kamourà, ka mabatoung ta irou-ah ka makka-reia ki makka-raour, ka mirong-ah itou-lam ti Abrahaman Ifaäk-an, ti Jakob-an, tou peisasou-an ki tounnoun ki vullu vullum.
S.TRANSL: Doch ick segghe u dat bele fullen komen ban Oolten ende Welten ende sullen met Abraham ende Ilaac ende Jacob aensitten in t Koninckryck der Hemelen. = |
And I say unto you, That many shall come from the east and west, and shall sit down with Abraham, and Isaac, and Jacob, in the kingdom of heaven.
我又告訴你們，從東從西，將有許多人來，在天國裏與亞伯拉罕、以撒、雅各一同坐席；

S.FORM: Ra neni ka alalak ki Peisasou-an saki-mamal-'an-eih toukarundum-an ka siouro itoutauag, ka akoume-'ah hynna ta tangi-tangi-en ki pat-it-ing-en-appa ki waligh-dâ.
Ra neni ka alalak ki Peisasou-an saki-mamal-'an-eih toukarundum-an ka siouro itoutauag, ka akoume-'ah hynna ta tangi-tangi-en ki pat-it-ing-en-appa ki waligh-dâ.
S.TRANSL: Ende dc kinderen des Koninckrijcks fullen uptgewoyrpen worden inde buytenste duysernille . aldaer sal weeninge3yn tnde knesfinghe Der tanden.
But the children of the kingdom shall be cast out into outer darkness: there shall be weeping and gnashing of teeth.
惟有本國的子民竟被趕到外邊黑暗裏去，在那裏必要哀哭切齒了。」

S.FORM: Ka ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus ki Mei-sasou ki fat ka'-ætou-han [ki voual] Dmmarang-â, paamt-auh kowmama ki ni-tnamsing-enhou. Ka ni-kæuh-darikah ta rarauwei tyn d'lligh tou kidi ki ta'lei k'anna
Ka ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus ki Mei-sasou ki fat ka'-ætou-han [ki voual] Dmmarang-â, paamt-auh kowmama ki ni-tnamsing-enhou. Ka ni-kæuh-darikah ta rarauwei tyn d'lligh tou kidi ki ta'lei k'anna
S.TRANSL: Ende Jetus leyde tot den Hooftman ober hondert Gaet Jenen erde u geschiede geliick ghy gelooft hebc. Eii syn knecht 1s gesont geworden te dier selber uyre.
And Jesus said unto the centurion, Go thy way; and as thou hast believed, so be it done unto thee. And his servant was healed in the selfsame hour.
耶穌對百夫長說：「你回去吧！照你的信心，給你成全了。」那時，他的僕人就好了。 （可1‧29－34；路4‧38－41）

S.FORM: Ka rou ni-ou-rarbo-en ti Jesus ki tallah ti Petrus, ni-kmytta ki Raren'an ki kei-en tyn ka malaliko, ka ayngytting.
Ka rou ni-ou-rarbo-en ti Jesus ki tallah ti Petrus, ni-kmytta ki Raren'an ki kei-en tyn ka malaliko, ka ayngytting.
S.TRANSL: EndeJesus gekomen zinde in het huys Petr1 sag syn wijfs moeder { te bedde ] liggen hebbende de kortse.
And when Jesus was come into Peter's house, he saw his wife's mother laid, and sick of a fever.
耶穌到了彼得家裏，見彼得的岳母害熱病躺着。

S.FORM: Ka ni-smourap ki rima tyn, ka ni-atta ral ta ayngit tyni-æn, ka ni-æhpit ka ni-peileil'ig tyn tyni-æn.
Ka ni-smourap ki rima tyn, ka ni-atta ral ta ayngit tyni-æn, ka ni-æhpit ka ni-peileil'ig tyn tyni-æn.
S.TRANSL: Endehp raeckte hare handt aen ende de kortle berher haer ende sy stondt op ende diende hen-lieden.
And he touched her hand, and the fever left her: and she arose, and ministered unto them.
耶穌把她的手一摸，熱就退了；她就起來服事耶穌。

S.FORM: Irou ka kakah-' an madoung, ni-maäd tyni-æn ki mabatoung ka ni-ou-Lyttou, ka ni-padarang-en tyn ki fou ta Ioep-an [ka matt'e], ka ni-paka-kou-ri-dægh ymmid neini-æn ka assi mariang ki voual.
Irou ka kakah-' an madoung, ni-maäd tyni-æn ki mabatoung ka ni-ou-Lyttou, ka ni-padarang-en tyn ki fou ta Ioep-an [ka matt'e], ka ni-paka-kou-ri-dægh ymmid neini-æn ka assi mariang ki voual.
S.TRANSL: Endeals het laet geworden was hebben sy bele ban den Dupbel beseten tot hem gebracht nde hy wierp desboose]geestenupt met den woorwooyrde ende hy genas alle die qualick geltelt waren.
When the even was come, they brought unto him many that were possessed with devils: and he cast out the spirits with his word, and healed all that were sick:
到了晚上，有人帶着許多被鬼附的來到耶穌跟前，他只用一句話就把鬼都趕出去，並且治好了一切有病的人。

S.FORM: Alei ka pam't-aul-ato ta na sou ki Tama-mattæi-tan ka ti Esajas, ka k'ma, Ni-'ara tyn pouhalap tyni-æn ta assi kafah-kit-eneta, ka tub'bhgan tyn ta kaalam-[eta.]
Alei ka pam't-aul-ato ta na sou ki Tama-mattæi-tan ka ti Esajas, ka k'ma, Ni-'ara tyn pouhalap tyni-æn ta assi kafah-kit-eneta, ka tub'bhgan tyn ta kaalam-[eta.]
S.TRANSL: Opndat berbult soude worden dat gesprroken was door Jelaiam den Propheet leggeii y heeft onse krankheden [op hem] genomen ende [onfe] sieckten gedragen.
That it might be fulfilled which was spoken by Esaias the prophet, saying, Himself took our infirmities, and bare our sicknesses.
這是要應驗先知以賽亞的話，說： （路9‧57－62）

S.FORM: Tou kakytt'an ti Jesus ki mabatoung ki makoi-lalaulau ka tou ritoung tyni-æn, ni-padingi-en tyn pa-ou-arogh patau-avang.
Tou kakytt'an ti Jesus ki mabatoung ki makoi-lalaulau ka tou ritoung tyni-æn, ni-padingi-en tyn pa-ou-arogh patau-avang.
S.TRANSL: EndeJesus bele icharen sienderond'om hem bebal aen d'andere rijde ober te
Now when Jesus saw great multitudes about him, he gave commandment to depart unto the other side.
耶穌見許多人圍着他，就吩咐渡到那邊去。

S.FORM: Ka ni-iroua tyni-æn saat ki Makou-sasoulat, ka ni-k'ma tyni-æn, Tama-matautauugh, ǣæuæug-au-mau kow mang ta sahkaqua-ei-'mhou.
Ka ni-iroua tyni-æn saat ki Makou-sasoulat, ka ni-k'ma tyni-æn, Tama-matautauugh, ǣæuæug-au-mau kow mang ta sahkaqua-ei-'mhou.
S.TRANSL: Ende daer quam een leecker Schiitftgeleerde tot hem ende seyde tot hem JNeester ick sal u bolghen waer ghy oock henen gaet.
And a certain scribe came, and said unto him, Master, I will follow thee whithersoever thou goest.
有一個文士來，對他說：「夫子，你無論往哪裏去，我要跟從你。」

S.FORM: Ka ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus tyni-æn; Akou-lbas ta mamei hanna, akou-laulau ta ajajam ka [fæuæbugh] tou vullum: râ äousi ki mamang ta Alak ki kaeuloung ka pakih-qua-eih ki voung-o tyn.
Ka ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus tyni-æn; Akou-lbas ta mamei hanna, akou-laulau ta ajajam ka [fæuæbugh] tou vullum: râ äousi ki mamang ta Alak ki kaeuloung ka pakih-qua-eih ki voung-o tyn.
S.TRANSL: Ende Jesus fende tot â€š Hem De bossen hebben holen ende de bogelen des Hemels nesten : maer de Sone des menschen en heeft niet ware? hy t hooft neder legge.
And Jesus saith unto him, The foxes have holes, and the birds of the air have nests; but the Son of man hath not where to lay his head.
耶穌說：「狐狸有洞，天空的飛鳥有窩，人子卻沒有枕頭的地方。」

S.FORM: Kapani [ki vouel] ka nipæhtæutæu-en tyn, ni-k'ma tyni-æn, Meirang, hahei-koh ki ouqu'ei-mau si-ouro rmavak ki Raraman-au.
Kapani [ki vouel] ka nipæhtæutæu-en tyn, ni-k'ma tyni-æn, Meirang, hahei-koh ki ouqu'ei-mau si-ouro rmavak ki Raraman-au.
S.TRANSL: Ende een ander uyt fthne Discipelen sepde toc Hem Heere laet my toe dat ick eerst henen gae endemynen bade? begrabe.
And another of his disciples said unto him, Lord, suffer me first to go and bury my father.
又有一個門徒對耶穌說：「主啊，容我先回去埋葬我的父親。」

S.FORM: Râ ni-kma ta ti Jesus tyni-æn, Mææuæugh-a jau-an, nda pa-ravak-â ki patei, neini-æn ka ni-mapatei.
Râ ni-kma ta ti Jesus tyni-æn, Mææuæugh-a jau-an, nda pa-ravak-â ki patei, neini-æn ka ni-mapatei.
S.TRANSL: Doch Jesus leyde tot hem Dolght my ende laet De doode hare dooden begraen.
But Jesus said unto him, Follow me; and let the dead bury their dead.
耶穌說：「任憑死人埋葬他們的死人；你跟從我吧！」 （可4‧35－41；路8‧22－25）

S.FORM: Irou ka ni-mou-avang ta teni, ni-mææuugh tyni-æn ta Pahtatæutæu-en tyn.
Irou ka ni-mou-avang ta teni, ni-mææuugh tyni-æn ta Pahtatæutæu-en tyn.
S.TRANSL: Ende als hy in het schip gegaen was zijn hem syne Discipelen gebolght.
And when he was entered into a ship, his disciples followed him.
耶穌上了船，門徒跟着他。

S.FORM: Ka kytt'ei, ka ni-mæhpyt ta rouar ka irang tou vaoung, k'ma-appa-hynna ka ni-ou-halap ki roung-wal ta avang: Teni-râ ta ni-merip.
Ka kytt'ei, ka ni-mæhpyt ta rouar ka irang tou vaoung, k'ma-appa-hynna ka ni-ou-halap ki roung-wal ta avang: Teni-râ ta ni-merip.
S.TRANSL: Ende Ende siet daer ontiondt een groote onltuymigheyt in de ree alsoo dat het schip ban de golben bedeckt wiert : doch hy fliep.
And, behold, there arose a great tempest in the sea, insomuch that the ship was covered with the waves: but he was asleep.
海裏忽然起了暴風，甚至船被波浪掩蓋；耶穌卻睡着了。

S.FORM: Ka rou iroua ta Pæhtatæutæu-en tyn, ni-pa-patti-mæuæh tyni-æn, koun, Meirang, ka-ding-ou-kame, kou mapapatei kytta.
Ka rou iroua ta Pæhtatæutæu-en tyn, ni-pa-patti-mæuæh tyni-æn, koun, Meirang, ka-ding-ou-kame, kou mapapatei kytta.
S.TRANSL: Ende zijne Discipelen bp [hem] komende hebben gem opgeweckt seggende t behoedt ons wp bergaen.
And his disciples came to him, and awoke him, saying, Lord, save us: we perish.
門徒來叫醒了他，說：「主啊，救我們，我們喪命啦！」

S.FORM: Ka ni-massousou neini-æn, Ka oumang ka mah-takout kamouemoumi ka ouffyng ki tnamsing-an? Nda ka ni-æhpit ta teni ni-patym-hgan tyn ta vare vaoung-appa: ka ouhang-ato palungpung [ka ni-äousi ki sypau.]
Ka ni-massousou neini-æn, Ka oumang ka mahtakout kamouemoumi ka ouffyng ki tnamsing-an? Nda ka ni-æhpit ta teni ni-patym-hgan tyn ta vare vaoung-appa: ka ouhang-ato palungpung [ka ni-äousi ki sypau.]
S.TRANSL: Ende hy sende tot Haer Wat zijt ghp breefachtigh ghy klepn-geloobige? Doe ftondt hy op ende beirafte de winden en de ree: ende daer wiert groote ftilte.
And he saith unto them, Why are ye fearful, O ye of little faith? Then he arose, and rebuked the winds and the sea; and there was a great calm.
耶穌說：「你們這小信的人哪，為甚麼膽怯呢？」於是起來，斥責風和海，風和海就大大地平靜了。

S.FORM: Ka ni-mouh-kiap ta tau, koun, Mamang ta teni k'atta, ka milligh tyni-æn ta vare vaoung-appa?
Ka ni-mouh-kiap ta tau, koun, Mamang ta teni k'atta, ka milligh tyni-æn ta vare vaoung-appa?
S.TRANSL: Ende de menichen berwonderden hae? seggende Hoedanigh een 1s dese dat oock de winden ende de ree hem gehoorsaem3yn#
But the men marvelled, saying, What manner of man is this, that even the winds and the sea obey him!
眾人希奇，說：「這是怎樣的人？連風和海也聽從他了！」 （可5‧1－20；路8‧26－39）

S.FORM: Irou ka ni-mou-arough ta teni tou pourough ki Gergesenen, ni-mæuæuäkla tyni-æn rarouha ki ni-ou-Lyttou, ka rava-ravak, ka ni-malouaf maplæh, k'ma-appa-hynna ka assi hma-lylpough hmari-vat ta timamang ki darang k'anna.

Irou ka ni-mou-arough ta teni tou pourough ki Gergesenen, ni-mæuæuäkla tyni-æn rarouha ki ni-ou-Lyttou, ka rava-ravak, ka ni-malouaf maplæh, k'ma-appa-hynna ka assi hma-lylpough hmari-vat ta timamang ki darang k'anna.
S.TRANSL: Ende als hy obe: aen d ander rijde was ghekomen in het landt der Gergelenen zijn hem twee ban den Duybel beeten ontmoetet komende uyt de grraben die leer wreedt waren also dat niemandt door dien wegh konde boorby gaen.
And when he was come to the other side into the country of the Gergesenes, there met him two possessed with devils, coming out of the tombs, exceeding fierce, so that no man might pass by that way.
耶穌既渡到那邊去，來到加大拉人的地方，就有兩個被鬼附的人從墳塋裏出來迎着他，極其凶猛，甚至沒有人能從那條路上經過。

S.FORM: Ka kytt'ei ni-mako-langæh ta neni, koun, Mang-amien ymhou-appa Jesus ka Alak ki Alid? Irouato kow hia parping paka-hymko ymian æn, dou äou-si-appa kidi-râ?
Ka kytt'ei ni-mako-langæh ta neni, koun, Mang-amien ymhou-appa Jesus ka Alak ki Alid? Irouato kow hia parping paka-hymko ymian æn, dou äou-si-appa kidi-râ?
S.TRANSL: Ende siet sy riepen seggende Jesu ghy Sone Godts wat hebben wp met u[te doens]Zht ghy hier Me komen om ons te pijnigen boot den tydt :
And, behold, they cried out, saying, What have we to do with thee, Jesus, thou Son of God? art thou come hither to torment us before the time?
他們喊着說：「上帝的兒子，我們與你有甚麼相干？時候還沒有到，你就上這裏來叫我們受苦嗎？」

S.FORM: Ka tou dalia neini-æn niakou-jouagh ki madag ki vavoei ka bævæuavæuæh kmiym ki kannau nein.
Ka tou dalia neini-æn niakou-jouagh ki madag ki vavoei ka bævæuavæuæh kmiym ki kannau nein.
S.TRANSL: Ende berre ban hae? was een kudde beler swynen wepdende.
And there was a good way off from them an herd of many swine feeding.
離他們很遠，有一大群豬吃食。

S.FORM: Ka ni-tmoumimia tyni-æn ta Lyttou-Lyttou, koun, Iro rou pa-darang-kow ymiæn-æn, hahei-ei-kame pa-darang pa-ou-rbo tou jouagh ki vavoei.
Ka ni-tmoumimia tyni-æn ta Lyttou-Lyttou, koun, Iro rou pa-darang-kow ymiæn-æn, hahei-ei-kame pa-darang pa-ou-rbo tou jouagh ki vavoei.
S.TRANSL: Ende de Dupbelen baden hem seggende Jndien ghy ons uytweyyt laet ons toe dat wy in die kudde swynen baren.
So the devils besought him, saying, If thou cast us out, suffer us to go away into the herd of swine.
鬼就央求耶穌，說：「若把我們趕出去，就打發我們進入豬群吧！」

S.FORM: Ka ni-k'ma ta teni neini-æn, Ou-kouâ. Neni-râ dou mou-pænæh, ni-mou-koua mou-rbo ki jouagh ki vavoei: ka kytt'ei, va-varing-bing ta ymmid ki jouagh ki vavoei makka æbavoak tou vaoung, ka ni-pis-tarimoukah tou raloraloum.

Ka ni-k'ma ta teni neini-æn, Ou-kouâ. Neni-râ dou mou-pænæh, ni-mou-koua mou-rbo ki jouagh ki vavoei: ka kytt'ei, va-varing-bing ta ymmid ki jouagh ki vavoei makka æbavoak tou vaoung, ka ni-pis-tarimoukah tou raloraloum.
S.TRANSL: Ende hy sepde tot haer Gaet henen. Ende sy uptgaende boeren henen in de kudde swijnen : ende siec de gheheele kudde swynen ortede ban de steplte af in de Zee mde storben in het wats,

And he said unto them, Go. And when they were come out, they went into the herd of swine: and, behold, the whole herd of swine ran violently down a steep place into the sea, and perished in the waters.
耶穌說：「去吧！」鬼就出來，進入豬群。全群忽然闖下山崖，投在海裏淹死了。

S.FORM: Ka ni-ylpout ta ni-sou-ajam: ka rou ni-mæuæumato, ni-ginnau ymmid ki mamang-da [ki att'-appa ka ni-pamt-en] tyni-æn ka ni-ou Lyttou.
Ka ni-ylpout ta ni-sou-ajam: ka rou ni-mæuæumato, ni-ginnau ymmid ki mamang-da [ki att'-appa ka ni-pamt-en] tyni-æn ka ni-ou Lyttou.
S.TRANSL: Efi diese weyden zijn geblucht:es als n in destade gekomen waren boodschapten sy alle [dese] dingen ende wat di besetent[ gefchiet was]
And they that kept them fled, and went their ways into the city, and told every thing, and what was befallen to the possessed of the devils.
放豬的就逃跑進城，將這一切事和被鬼附的人所遭遇的都告訴人。

S.FORM: Ka kytt'ei, ni-mouh-tmouk ta sat kaæum'an dmoum madoumma ti Jesus-an. Ka rou kytt'an nein tyni-æn, ni-tmoumimia ka mali-daeu-ah ki kidi ki pourouh nein. Ka mamattouda ki lbæh ki soulat.
Ka kytt'ei, ni-mouh-tmouk ta sat kaæum'an dmoum madoumma ti Jesus-an. Ka rou kytt'an nein tyni-æn, ni-tmoumimia ka mali-daeu-ah ki kidi ki pourouh nein. Ka mamattouda ki lbæh ki soulat.
S.TRANSL: Endesiet de gehecle badt gingh uyt Jesu te gemoet : ende als ip hem sagen baden sy dat hy uyt Hare landtpalen wilde ber-
And, behold, the whole city came out to meet Jesus: and when they saw him, they besought him that he would depart out of their coasts.
合城的人都出來迎見耶穌，既見了就央求他離開他們的境界。
